Hero.title: NARD
Hero.subtitle: Spikenard. Pure nobility originating from the high Himalayas. A cyber-minimalist harmony of scent and texture.

Products.perfumeDesc: Reborn through modern molecular synthesis, the noble oil of rare spikenard roots harvested from 4000m altitudes in the Himalayas. Earthy, rich amber, and calm velvet.
Products.poloDesc: 280 GSM premium heavyweight, 100% organic linen-cotton blend. Tailored in a tactile sage green weave for an exquisite presence.
Products.notesTop: Top Notes: Himalayan Breeze, Clary Sage, Bergamot
Products.notesHeart: Heart Notes: Pure Spikenard Oil, Dry Rose, Marble Dust
Products.notesBase: Base Notes: Warm Amber, Sandalwood, Velvety Musk

NebulaRegion.selectDesc: Please select your preferred region. Language and currency will be synchronized automatically.

Quiz.title: Molecular Scent Synthesizer
Quiz.subtitle: Embark on an emotional journey to synthesize your signature scent and style molecule.
Quiz.q1: Which frequency do you feel yourself at today?
Quiz.q2: What is the sensory element active in your mind?
Quiz.q2a1: Rain-drenched pine forest and cold stone
Quiz.q2a2: Ancient libraries and warm polished wood
Quiz.q2a3: Smoky incense, ambergris, and metallic winds
Quiz.q3: Which fabric texture suits your skin best?
Quiz.q3a1: Breezy linen and organic combed cotton
Quiz.q3a2: Dense velvet and heavy anthracite layers
Quiz.q3a3: Supple knit structures with soft gold stitching
Quiz.resultDesc: Synthesized based on your emotional state, scent molecules, and tactile profile:
Quiz.packDesc: Your customized NARD Perfume paired with the 100% harmonized NARD Organic Polo.
